<section class="section news-home-outer mg-md">
 <div class="wrapper">
 <div class="outer-grid flex">
 <div class="news-home-inner">
 <div class="section-header">
 <h2><a href="https://www.philenews.com/kypros/koinonia/">ΕΙΔΗΣΕΙΣ ΕΝΤΟΣ

const generalTerms = {"themeDirectory":"https:\/\/www.philenews.com\/wp-content\/themes\/philenews","cssVer":{"main":"250413-192455","utilities":"250528-131320","header":"250116-103252","footer":"241205-131653","fonts":"250528-132611","article":"250318-72732","agenda":"230522-190554","override":"260128-104938","app":"241230-134616"},"jsVer":{"scripts":"251114-114610","assets":"250613-110515","ads":"250613-113746","adsHome":"240520-110037","adsSingle":"241115-120242","adsArchive":"230914-144543","adsHomeApp":"250613-95243","contact":"240227-95300","uaparser":"230504-134655","onesignal":"240130-95559"}}

<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.philenews.com/wp-content/themes/philenews/scripts/app-overrides.js?ver=230808-110321" id="app-overrides-js"></script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    const insertAdsScript = () => {
        const adsScript = document.createElement('script');
        adsScript.src = 'https://www.philenews.com/wp-content/themes/philenews/scripts/ads.js?250613-113746';
        document.querySelector('.js-ads-script').insertAdjacentElement('afterend', adsScript);
        console.log('inserted ads script') 
    }

    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        console.log('document loaded') 
        const tbl = document.querySelector('.blogs-home #taboola-below-article-thumbnails-feed-2');
        console.log('i exists ',tbl);
        if (tbl !== null) document.querySelector('.blogs-home #taboola-below-article-thumbnails-feed-2').style.display = 'none';
        setTimeout(() => {
            console.log('time to load the ads!')
            const consentElement = document.getElementById('iosconsent');
            const isIOS = consentElement.dataset.device;
            const permissionStatus = consentElement.dataset.consent;
            if (isIOS == 'ios' ) {
                if (permissionStatus == 'yes') {
                    const adsScript = document.createElement('script');
                    adsScript.src = 'https://www.philenews.com/wp-content/themes/philenews/scripts/ads.js?250613-113746';
                    document.querySelector('.js-ads-script').insertAdjacentElement('afterend', adsScript);
                } 
            } else {
                const adsScript = document.createElement('script');
                adsScript.src = 'https://www.philenews.com/wp-content/themes/philenews/scripts/ads.js?250613-113746';
                document.querySelector('.js-ads-script').insertAdjacentElement('afterend', adsScript);
                console.log('inserted ads script')
            }  
        }, 3000);
    })

    const isApp = [...document.querySelectorAll('link')].map(a => a.href).filter(b => b.includes('app.css')).length > 0 ? true : false;
    const uap = new UAParser();
    const client = uap.getResult();
    if (client.browser.name.toLowerCase().includes('webview') || client.browser.name.includes('WebKit')) {        
        document.body.setAttribute('data-ads-app', 'true');
        if (!isApp) {
            const appLink = document.createElement('link');
            appLink.rel = 'stylesheet';
            appLink.href = `${generalTerms.themeDirectory}/styles/app.css?${generalTerms.cssVer.app}`;
            // document.head.lastElementChild.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', appLink);
            document.querySelector('.laststyle').insertAdjacentElement('afterend', appLink);
            if (document.body.getAttribute('page') == 'single-item' || document.body.getAttribute('page') == 'page') {
                if (document.querySelector('.top-section')) document.querySelector('.top-section').style.marginTop = '0px';
            }
        }
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.main-header-app .menu-nav-header .logo a, .main-header-app .menu-inner-wrapper .nav-list-item:first-of-type .nav-item.category a').forEach(a => a.href = 'https://philenews/app-homepage');
        [...document.querySelectorAll('a')].filter(a => a.target == '_blank' && a.href.includes('www.philenews.com')).forEach(a => a.removeAttribute('target'));

        // >>>>>>> DEACTIVATE PULL-TO-REFRESH FOR TESTING <<<<<<<
        // pull-to-refresh 
        const pullToRefresh = document.querySelector('.pull-to-refresh');
        let touchstartY = 0;
        document.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
            touchstartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
        });
        document.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
            const touchY = e.touches[0].clientY;
            const touchDiff = touchY - touchstartY;
            if (touchDiff > 0 && window.scrollY === 0) {
                pullToRefresh.classList.add('visible');
                e.preventDefault();
            }
        });
        document.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
            if (pullToRefresh.classList.contains('visible')) {
                pullToRefresh.classList.remove('visible');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    location.reload();
                }, 2000)
            }
        });  
        
        // keep webview in focus when app is in the background
        
        let refreshIntervalID = null;

        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', (event) => {
            console.log(event)
            if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden') {
                refreshIntervalID = setInterval(() => {
                    window.location.reload();
                    window.focus();
                }, 30000)
            }

            if (document.visibilityState === 'visible') {
                if (null !== refreshIntervalID) {
                    clearInterval(refreshIntervalID);
                    refreshIntervalID = null;
                    clearInterval(localStorage.getItem('intervalID'));
                    localStorage.setItem('intervalID', null);
                }
            }

            localStorage.setItem('intervalID', refreshIntervalID);
        });

        // window.addEventListener('blur', () => {
        //     refreshIntervalID = setInterval(() => {
        //         window.location.reload();
        //         window.focus();
        //     }, 30000)
        // })

        // window.addEventListener('focus', () => {
        //     if (null !== refreshIntervalID) {
        //         clearInterval(refreshIntervalID);
        //         refreshIntervalID = null;
        //     }
        // });
        document.querySelector('.view__meta').content = 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=0';
        if (document.querySelector('.main-header-app .menu .nav-item-sublist')) {
            [...document.querySelector('.main-header-app .menu .nav-item-sublist').children].map(a => a.querySelector('a')).forEach(a => {
                a.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                event.preventDefault();
                window.location.href = a.href;
                })
            })
        } 
    } else {
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            // set happening__now bar styles
            const happNowStyles = document.createElement('style');
            happNowStyles.innerText = '.happ__now.happ__now--app{display:none}.happ__now.happ__now--nonapp{display:block}';
            document.head.appendChild(happNowStyles);

            setTimeout(() => {
                const tblscript = document.createElement('script');
                tblscript.src = '//pahtoa.tech/c/philenews.com.js';
                tblscript.async = true;
                document.head.appendChild(tblscript);
                tblscript.onload = () => console.log('taboola script loaded');  
            }, 2500);
        })
        
    }

    

    // happening now banner 
    
    if (document.querySelector('.happ__now')) {
        const hnSwiper = new Swiper('.hn__swiper', {
            effect: 'fade',
            pagination: {
                el: '.swiper-pagination',
                clickable: true,
            },
        });

        const slides = [...document.querySelectorAll('.hn__slide')];

        hnSwiper.on('realIndexChange', (swiper) => {
            slides.forEach(slide => getPostTimeDiff(slide));
            console.log(hnSwiper.activeIndex);
        });
    }
</script>
<a href="#" id="scroll-to-top" title="Scroll to top"><span class="arrow-up"></span></a>
<script>
    var scrollToTopBtn = document.getElementById("scroll-to-top");

    window.onscroll = function() {
        if (document.documentElement.scrollTop > 300) {
            scrollToTopBtn.style.display = "block";
        } else {
            scrollToTopBtn.style.display = "none";
        }
    };

    scrollToTopBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
        document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0;
    });
</script>

    <script>
    // Define the emerging container properties
    var containerDiv = document.createElement('div');
    containerDiv.id = 'emergingContainer';
    containerDiv.style.position = 'fixed';
    containerDiv.style.bottom = '-200px';
    containerDiv.style.left = '0';
    containerDiv.style.width = '100%';
    containerDiv.style.height = '100px';
    containerDiv.style.backgroundColor = 'none';
    containerDiv.style.zIndex = 1002;
    containerDiv.style.transition = 'bottom 0.5s';

    // Create the inner container
    var innerContainer = document.createElement('div');
    innerContainer.style.position = 'relative';
    innerContainer.style.display = 'flex';
    innerContainer.style.justifyContent = 'center';
    innerContainer.style.alignItems = 'center';
    innerContainer.style.zIndex = 1003;
    innerContainer.style.width = '100%';
    innerContainer.style.height = '100%';

    // Create the placeholder image
    var placeholderImg = document.createElement('img');
    placeholderImg.src = 'https://placehold.co/900x90';

    // Append the placeholder image to the inner container
    innerContainer.appendChild(placeholderImg);
    // Append the inner container to the emerging container
    containerDiv.appendChild(innerContainer);

    // Create the close button div
    var closeButton = document.createElement('div');
    closeButton.id = 'closeButton';
    closeButton.style.position = 'absolute';
    closeButton.style.zIndex = 1003;
    closeButton.style.top = '-10px';
    closeButton.style.right = '10%';
    closeButton.style.width = '20px';
    closeButton.style.height = '20px';
    closeButton.style.cursor = 'pointer';

    // Create the spans that form the "X" button
    var closeSpan1 = document.createElement('span');
    var closeSpan2 = document.createElement('span');
    closeSpan1.style.position = closeSpan2.style.position = 'absolute';
    closeSpan1.style.top = closeSpan2.style.top = '50%';
    closeSpan1.style.left = closeSpan2.style.left = '50%';
    closeSpan1.style.width = closeSpan2.style.width = '20px';
    closeSpan1.style.height = closeSpan2.style.height = '2px';
    closeSpan1.style.backgroundColor = closeSpan2.style.backgroundColor = '#000';
    closeSpan1.style.transformOrigin = closeSpan2.style.transformOrigin = 'center';
    closeSpan1.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s';
    closeSpan2.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s';

    // Set initial rotation for closeSpan1
    closeSpan1.style.transform = 'rotate(45deg)';
    closeSpan2.style.transform = 'rotate(-45deg)';
    // Append the spans to the close button div
    closeButton.appendChild(closeSpan1);
    closeButton.appendChild(closeSpan2);

    // Append the close button div to the container
    containerDiv.appendChild(closeButton);

    // Append the container to the document body
    document.body.appendChild(containerDiv);

    // Animate the container to appear at the bottom of the page
    function showAdContainer() {
        containerDiv.style.bottom = '0';
    }

    // Hide the container after 10 seconds
    function hideAdContainer() {
        containerDiv.style.bottom = '-100px';
    }

    // Close the container when the close button is clicked
    closeButton.addEventListener('click', hideAdContainer);

    // Call the showAdContainer function after a delay or at an appropriate time
    setTimeout(function() {
        showAdContainer();
        setTimeout(hideAdContainer, 100000);
    }, 2000); // Change the delay time as per your requirements
    </script>
    -->

<style type="text/css">
div#emergingContainer:after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    bottom: 0;
    filter: blur(8px);
    -o-filter: blur(8px);
    -ms-filter: blur(8px);
    -moz-filter: blur(8px);
    -webkit-filter: blur(8px);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}
</style>

</body>
</html>
